uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth User ID

chat.title: Chat Session
chat.description: A conversation topic or thread created by a user

userId.description: Owner userId who created this chat

title.description: User-facing title of the conversation thread

model.description: The AI model identifier selected for this conversation

updatedAt.description: When the thread last had a message

message.title: Chat Message
message.description: An individual message block within a conversation thread

userId.description: The user ID of the messager

content.description: The markdown or text body of the message

fileName.description: Optional name of uploaded file associated with this message

fileSize.description: Optional size in bytes of uploaded file

fileType.description: Optional MIME type of uploaded file

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this message was created

/users/{userId}.description: Users collection holding user profile and metadata

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Messages subcollection for each specific conversation thread
